_comment: Generic model configuration template for QAIRT WoS ARM64 pipeline
_version_note: Template example only. Actual SDK version is read from data/config/qairt_env.json (_version field) at runtime; this _version literal is not consumed by any script and may lag behind the installed SDK version.
_platform: Windows on Snapdragon (WoS) ARM64 - Snapdragon X Elite (V73)

input.name: input
input._note: QNN HTP inference uses NHWC internally; converter handles transposition

conversion._comment: Precision variants to build. Each entry produces a separate DLL + context binary.

variants._note: Recommended for WoS ARM64. Use --no_simplification for QAIRT 2.45.
Recommended for vision models. Requires calibration data.

tool_paths._comment: QAIRT 2.45 WoS ARM64 tool path rules
tool_paths._warning: qnn-model-lib-generator is in aarch64-windows-msvc/, NOT x86_64-windows-msvc/

context_binary._comment: HTP backend configuration for context binary generation

inference._comment: qai_appbuilder inference configuration (ARM64 Python, python_arm64_venv from data\config\qairt_env.json)
inference._note: qnn_lib_path='' uses qai_appbuilder built-in libs. Input format: NHWC numpy array.

environment._comment: Required environment setup for WoS ARM64 (QAIRT 2.45). All paths read from data\config\qairt_env.json.
required_setup: vcvarsall.bat arm64 (path from vs_vcvarsall in data\config\qairt_env.json)
PATH must include aarch64-windows-msvc and x86_64-windows-msvc
environment.python_venv: python_x64_venv (x86_64 Python 3.10, conversion) / python_arm64_venv (ARM64 Python 3.13, inference)
qairt_notes: QAIRT 2.45: No need to patch Conv2d reuse_sparse_indices
QAIRT 2.45: Unknown Key warnings during context binary generation are non-fatal
QAIRT 2.45: Use --no_simplification with qnn-onnx-converter on WoS

calibration._comment: Calibration data configuration for INT quantization
calibration._note: Each .raw file: float32 binary, shape matching model input in NHWC layout

multi_size_variants._comment: Example multi-size configuration for models supporting variable input sizes
multi_size_variants._usage: Run pipeline once per size variant, using --input_dim for each
